title: ophrys × lupiae
intro: Ophrys × lupiae is a hybrid orchid plant, specifically a cross between Ophrys speculum and Ophrys lupiae, native to the Mediterranean region. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues. The plant has been traditionally used to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. Ophrys × lupiae is often prepared as a herbal tea or dried extract, and its health benefits can be attributed to its ability to soothe respiratory issues and promote relaxation.
